MULTIMADNESS-THE_DEAL.description:
Gain 666 gold! And gain a potion slot!! And gain a rare card reward!!! 
*May cause untimely death of a teammate 
**May also cause them to lose 10 max hp 
***See terms and conditions for details
MULTIMADNESS-THE_DEAL.flavor: The terms and conditions consist of several vulgarities repeated for 4 paragraphs.
MULTIMADNESS-THE_DEAL.title: The Deal
MULTIMADNESS-HEFTY_GEODE.description:
ALL players can chip this geode at a rest site. 
When broken, the owner enchants a card with [gold]Prismatic[/gold].
MULTIMADNESS-HEFTY_GEODE.flavor: No matter how hard you hit it it will only ever chip.
MULTIMADNESS-HEFTY_GEODE.title: Hefty Geode
